text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At the crack of dawn following a day off, Admire
Vega starts training by herself. However...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I can't concentrate at all. Why am I so... so...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Stupid... I mean... staying up all night just to buy a
pair of slippers!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Admire Vega looks to be sleep-deprived.
